name_cn:
Black
Envelope_Quilted Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, Italian imported cowhide with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal Y-logo adds personality; flap design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central dividers, and one zippered pocket inside to hold everything!
Model: 620280
Size: 22.5x14x4cm
